name: Close-Grip Bench Press
setup: Lie on flat bench, grip bar shoulder-width (narrower than normal)
Do not grip too narrow (wrist strain risk)
execution: Lower bar to lower sternum, elbows tucked to sides
Touch and press back up, focusing on triceps drive
common_mistakes: Grip too narrow (wrist and elbow pain)
cues: Tuck elbows like you're holding a newspaper in your armpits
